full_name: Wrought aluminium alloy EN AW-2024 [Al Cu4Mg1], numeric 3.1355
version_year: Composition per EN 573-3; properties per EN 485 / EN 754 / EN 755
scope: High-strength heat-treatable Al-Cu-Mg aerospace alloy with good high-temperature strength and machinability but limited corrosion resistance (often clad). Used for aircraft structures, fittings and highly stressed parts.
license_note: EN AW-2024 designation and its nominal composition and typical T3 property ranges are widely published in free manufacturer datasheets and MatWeb; no paywalled EN standard text reproduced.
